description: Tune Wazuh's detection rules in /var/ossec/etc/rules/local_rules.xml to suppress false positives. Override rule 5402 ('Successful sudo to ROOT executed') to level 0 using the overwrite="yes" attribute while preserving the original rule logic (if_sid: 5401, match: '; USER=root ; COMMAND='). Additionally, create a child rule with ID 100100 for rule 5501 ('Login session opened') that suppresses alerts (level 0) for the 'backup_svc' user. Apply the changes to the Wazuh manager.
